description: Perform an internal link equity audit for 'https://books.toscrape.com/'. Export the internal link data to /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/ and save a comprehensive text report to /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/internal_links_report.txt. The report must include the total number of internal links found, the top 5 most-linked pages, examples of under-linked pages, an analysis of the most common anchor text used, and at least 3 specific recommendations for improving the internal linking structure.
